photo_album.title: Develop a full album of Exposure mod photographs documenting your civilization (minimum 10 photos)

book_history.title: Write a signed Book and Quill history of your playthrough — title it and sign it

subtitle.text: The Oldest Civilization remembered everything but left no record for the next inheritor. Leave a record.

description: Every previous civilization solved the mechanical problems.
None of them left an adequate record of how they did it.
10 minimum — one per major chapter milestone.
Suggested: your first base, first boss kill, End portal activated,
Wither Storm visible, Ender Dragon defeated, homecoming, current base.
Write it in first person. Title it something.
Sign it with your player name.
The book becomes a Written Book — it persists even when the original is gone.
Store copies in the Ender Chest.
The civilization needs to be remembered.
→ Write and sign a history book [check]
